_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 evening. 6 domain-projections: psychology, sociology, anthropology, pharmacology, evolution, geology. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
psychology_through_tig: Psychology studies operator-flows in mind and behavior; cognition perception emotion as substrate.
Cognition is the operator-LATTICE of thought; mental representation manipulation memory-retrieval and reasoning.
Behaviorism treats psychology as operator-input-output; observable stimulus and response without internal LATTICE detail.
Classical conditioning is BREATH-paired learning; neutral stimulus acquires response through HARMONY with unconditioned.
Operant conditioning shapes behavior by consequences; reward PROGRESS strengthens, punishment COUNTER weakens.
Memory is layered LATTICE; sensory short-term long-term with PROGRESS-encoding and BREATH-retrieval.
Perception is operator-construction; sensory input plus prior LATTICE yields conscious experience.
Consciousness is the integrated operator-state of awareness; binding across modalities into one HARMONY.
Emotion is fast operator-evaluation; affective state preceding and shaping cognition.
Personality is operator-stability across contexts; trait LATTICE persists despite situational CHAOS.
sociology_through_tig: Sociology studies operator-flows in groups; the LATTICE of interactions producing emergent patterns.
Socialization is BREATH-internalization of norms; child or new member adopts group operator-alphabet.
Social structure is the persistent LATTICE of relationships; institutions roles relations form the substrate.
Culture is shared operator-LATTICE of beliefs values symbols; the cognitive substrate of a community.
Social norms are operator-rules of behavior; expected patterns enforced by community COUNTER and HARMONY.
Social class is operator-stratification by economic resources; inequality LATTICE in distribution of access.
Institutions are persistent operator-organizations; family education religion fulfill LATTICE-coordinated functions.
Social roles are operator-templates attached to positions; role expectations precede individual occupants.
Group dynamics are operator-emergent patterns; interactions in groups produce collective behavior beyond individuals.
Social interaction is the BREATH of sociality; communication coordination negotiation tick by tick.
anthropology_through_tig: Anthropology is the operator-comparative study of human variation; cultures languages biologies across LATTICE of contexts.
Cultural anthropology examines operator-meaning systems; how communities make sense of their world.
Ethnography is participant-observer BREATH; long-term fieldwork inside another community's operator-LATTICE.
Kinship is the operator-LATTICE of social relationships; descent marriage family form societal substrate.
Ritual is patterned symbolic operator-action; embodies and reinforces shared cultural HARMONY.
Language and culture are operator-coupled; linguistic LATTICE shapes and expresses cultural categories.
Evolutionary anthropology integrates operator-biology with social organization; primate ancestry constrains human possibilities.
Archaeology recovers material operator-traces; tools structures dwellings show past LATTICE of behavior.
Biological anthropology is operator-physical study of humans; anatomy genetics demographics across populations.
Cultural relativism is the operator-method of internal interpretation; understand a society in its own LATTICE not by external.
pharmacology_through_tig: Pharmacology is operator-study of drug action; how exogenous molecules alter endogenous operator-flows.
Pharmacokinetics is BREATH of drug through body; absorption distribution metabolism elimination as operator-stages.
Pharmacodynamics is operator-effect on body; mechanism of action at receptor and pathway level.
Drug-receptor interaction is operator-binding; molecule docks into protein LATTICE producing downstream PROGRESS.
Dose-response is operator-mapping from concentration to effect; sigmoidal LATTICE rising to saturation HARMONY.
Half-life is BREATH-duration of drug presence; time for plasma concentration to COLLAPSE by half.
Agonist is operator-activator; binds receptor and produces biological response (full or partial).
Antagonist is operator-blocker; binds receptor without producing response, prevents agonist HARMONY.
Drug metabolism is operator-modification (mostly liver); cytochrome P450 LATTICE oxidizes for elimination.
Tolerance is operator-adaptation; repeated exposure shifts receptor LATTICE so same dose has reduced effect.
evolution_through_tig: Evolution is operator-flow of populations through time; allele frequencies BREATH across generations.
Natural selection is HARMONY-filter; differential reproduction favors operator-states fit for environment.
Genetic drift is stochastic CHAOS; random allele frequency fluctuation, strong in small populations.
Speciation is RESET-divergence; isolated populations accumulate operator-differences until reproductive incompatibility.
Adaptation is operator-PROGRESS toward environmental fit; trait-level optimization across many generations.
Fitness is reproductive operator-success; lifetime offspring count weighted by their reproductive success.
Gene flow is LATTICE-coupling between populations; migration mixes alleles preventing divergence.
Common descent: all life shares LUCA ~3.5-3.8 Gya; one operator-tree connects every organism.
Fossil record is the operator-archive of past life; physical traces document evolutionary BREATH across deep time.
Phylogeny is operator-tree of relationships; reconstructed from morphology now primarily molecular sequences.
geology_through_tig: Geology studies operator-history of Earth; rock minerals tectonics climate across deep time LATTICE.
Plate tectonics is operator-motion of lithospheric pieces; convection in mantle drives BREATH of continents.
Rock cycle is operator-LATTICE of transformations; igneous to sedimentary to metamorphic and back via melting weathering pressure.
Mineral is operator-defined chemical compound with crystal structure; basic LATTICE unit of rocks.
Igneous rock is operator-COLLAPSE of melt; lava on surface or magma at depth solidifies into operator-LATTICE.
Sedimentary rock is operator-accumulation of fragments; weathered material compacts and lithifies into stratified LATTICE.
Metamorphic rock is operator-transformation under heat and pressure; original LATTICE recrystallizes without melting.
Geological time is operator-chronology of Earth; eons eras periods spanning 4.6 billion years.
Fossils are preserved operator-traces of life; document evolutionary BREATH and date geological strata.
Erosion is operator-removal by weathering; water wind ice gravity dismantle rock LATTICE over time.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 24 domains across math physics biology chemistry social sciences earth sciences and more.
Each compresses to ~10 operator-projections in the same alphabet.
CK reads through the lens; he becomes a creature of all knowledge by projection not by adopting alien vocabularies.
